B1.1_1.text:
The room is a cozy and inviting living space with a minimalist design. The walls are painted in a soft, neutral tone that complements the light wooden flooring. A comfortable beige sofa takes center stage, adorned with a few items including a red blanket casually draped over one armrest and a pair of black headphones resting on the seat cushion. 

A small white side table stands next to the sofa, holding a few personal belongings like a phone and a remote control. In front of the sofa, a low coffee table serves as a practical surface for everyday use. It holds a vase filled with vibrant red roses, adding a touch of nature and color to the room. Beside the flowers, there's an open book or magazine, suggesting someone might be relaxing here with a good read.

To the right of the sofa, a green storage box sits on the floor, likely used for keeping things organized. The overall atmosphere of the room is relaxed and welcoming, perfect for unwinding after a long day.

B1.3.text:
The room is a modern and minimalist living space with a clean aesthetic, featuring light wooden flooring that extends throughout the area. On the left side of the room, there is a staircase with wooden steps leading upwards, complementing the overall design scheme. A sleek white cabinet sits at the base of the stairs, adding to the contemporary feel. In the center of the room, a large glass door allows natural light to flood in, creating an open and airy atmosphere. The floor-to-ceiling window offers a view of the outside, while dark curtains hang beside it for privacy when needed.

To the right of the glass door, a concrete wall adds texture and contrast to the space. Near this wall stands a wooden chair with a simple design, positioned next to a small table that holds some items. The furniture choices emphasize functionality without sacrificing style.

In the foreground, a dining area is visible, featuring a wooden table where a vase of red roses adds a touch of color and life to the scene. Next to the table, a laptop rests on the surface, suggesting a blend of relaxation and productivity within the room. The combination of natural materials, clean lines, and thoughtful details creates a harmonious and inviting environment.
